sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: «عَصَا السَّفَرِ مَنْ عَادَةِ الْأَسْفَارِ».
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: «Štap za putovanje dolazi od navike putovanja».
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: «The travel staff comes from the habit of traveling».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الِاسْتِعْدَادَ الْجَيِّدَ يَجْعَلُ الأُمُورَ أَسْهَلَ.
sentences.translation: To znači da dobra priprema čini stvari lakšim.
sentences.translationEn: This means that good preparation makes things easier.

sentences.arabic: حَضَّرَتْ مَيَّاسُ حَقِيبَتَهَا قَبْلَ الرِّحْلَةِ بِيَوْمَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Majas je pripremila svoju torbu dva dana prije putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Mayas prepared her bag two days before the trip.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتْ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ بِهُدُوءٍ وَبِدُونِ تَوَتُّرٍ.
sentences.translation: Stigla je na aerodrom mirno i bez stresa.
sentences.translationEn: She arrived at the airport calmly and without stress.
